{{Quote|Bridge, this is Grand Admiral Thrawn. Signal the ''Death's Head''; inform Captain Harbid we'll be temporarily leaving the Fleet. He's to continue making tactical surveys of the local systems and pulling data dumps wherever possible. Then set course for a planet called Myrkr—the nav computer has its location|[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] ordering a signal to Captain Harbid|<ref name="Heir to the Empire">''[[Heir to the Empire]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Death's Head''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
A short time before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] [[Reconnaissance of mercenary base|inadvertently]] came across the vessel, along with the rest of the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] task force, at an Imperial Weapons Testing Facility in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]].<ref name="XWA" />

Commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Harbid]] around [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], the ''Death's Head'' joined [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in his campaigns against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The ''Death's Head'' was initially spotted participating in an operation with the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] and the [[Judicator/Legends|''Judicator'']] to obtain the moss painting ''[[Killik Twilight]]'' on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

Later it would be sent to the [[Palanhi system/Legends|Palanhi system]] in a failed attempt to capture [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. The Star Destroyer was also present at the [[Battle of Ord Pardron|assault]] on the New Republic base of [[Ord Pardron/Legends|Ord Pardron]] as part of Thrawn's overall plan to [[Battle at Ukio|capture]] the [[Ukio system/Legends|Ukio system]]. ''Death's Head'' last appeared at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Death's Head'' acted as the inspiration for the ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer model that 3D fan artist [[Ansel Hsiao]] created and later submitted to [[Star Wars Insider 125|''Star Wars Insider'' 125]]. Until the release of ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'', it, specifically the first version, was also his last publicly released mesh, as the design was frequently used without his permission, such as the trailer for ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed|The Force Unleashed]]''.<ref name="FractalSponge">{{WebCite|url=http://fractalsponge.net/3D%20Projects.htm|text=3D Projects: Past, Present, and Future|archivedate=20200116164039}}</ref>
